title: olfersia lomarioides
intro: Olfersia lomarioides, also known as the Polypodium lomarioides, is a type of fern species that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. It is traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving respiratory health, as well as having potential antiviral and antibacterial properties. In herbal preparations, Olfersia lomarioides is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
